title: Smart Contract Testing: Unit Tests, Invariant Tests, and Slither Static Analysis
description: Write comprehensive tests for all four registry contracts using Hardhat + Chai + ethers.js. Include unit tests for all contract functions, invariant/property tests, and integrate Slither static analysis as a CI gate. Target 100% branch coverage for all registry contracts.
objectives: 100% branch coverage for all four registry contracts
Invariant tests: properties that must hold after any sequence of valid operations
Slither passes with zero high/medium severity findings
Gas benchmarks documented for all state-changing functions

steps: Step 1 - Test Structure: One test file per contract: test/IssuerRegistry.test.ts, test/TrustPolicyRegistry.test.ts, test/StatusRegistry.test.ts, test/ServiceRegistry.test.ts. Plus: test/integration/RegistryInteraction.test.ts for cross-contract scenarios.

Step 2 - Test Fixtures (Hardhat v2 loadFixture): deployIssuerRegistryFixture(), deployAllRegistriesFixture(). Use ethers.getSigners() for admin, user1, user2 accounts. Load fixtures with loadFixture to reset state between tests efficiently.

Step 3 - IssuerRegistry Tests: (1) registerIssuer: valid input emits IssuerRegistered; (2) duplicate DID reverts IssuerAlreadyRegistered; (3) non-admin reverts AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount; (4) revokeIssuer: emits IssuerRevoked, isIssuerActive returns false; (5) update after revoke reverts; (6) getIssuerCount after 3 registrations == 3; (7) getIssuerAtIndex enumerates correctly.

Step 4 - TrustPolicyRegistry Tests: (1) createPolicy with valid issuers; (2) createPolicy with unregistered issuer reverts UnknownIssuer; (3) updatePolicy increments version and saves history; (4) getPolicyHistory returns all versions; (5) isIssuerAllowedForService returns correct boolean; (6) deactivatePolicy sets active=false.

Step 5 - StatusRegistry Tests: (1) publishStatusAnchor stores anchor, emits event; (2) update anchor with same issuer+index overwrites; (3) verifyStatusAnchor returns false for wrong hash; (4) freshnessDeltaSeconds=59 reverts InvalidFreshnessDelta; (5) emitEmergencyRevocation emits event, no state change; (6) non-revocation-admin reverts.

Step 6 - ServiceRegistry Tests: (1) registerService for producer and consumer; (2) invalid role reverts InvalidRole; (3) getServicesByRole returns filtered list; (4) http:// URL on local chain (chainId 31337) is allowed; (5) deregisterService removes from role index; (6) updateService changes baseUrl.

Step 7 - Invariant Tests (property-based): Use Hardhat's stateful fuzzing or implement manually: (1) IssuerRegistry: isIssuerActive(did) == true implies did is in _issuerKeys array; (2) TrustPolicyRegistry: current policy version > all history versions; (3) StatusRegistry: stored credentialHash matches the one passed to publishStatusAnchor; (4) ServiceRegistry: deregistered service never returned by getServicesByRole.

Step 8 - Gas Benchmarks: Create test/gas/GasBenchmarks.test.ts. Record gas usage for: registerIssuer (target <80K), revokeIssuer (target <40K), publishStatusAnchor (target <60K), registerService (target <80K). Assert gas usage does not exceed target. This prevents gas regression.

Step 9 - Slither Integration: Install slither-analyzer (pip install slither-analyzer). Run: slither contracts/ --filter-paths '@openzeppelin' --checklist --markdown-root . > slither-report.md. Add Makefile target: analyze-contracts. CI fails if slither reports HIGH severity findings. MEDIUM findings require justification in .slither.config.json.
Step 10 - Coverage Report: npx hardhat coverage --network hardhat. Target: 100% branch coverage. Add badge to README. CI fails if coverage drops below 95%.
security_constraints: Slither HIGH findings must be zero — any finding must be fixed or explicitly documented as a false positive
Gas benchmarks must be enforced in CI — prevents gas regression from code changes
Test accounts must use Hardhat's predictable test accounts — never use external/funded accounts in tests

acceptance_criteria: npx hardhat test passes (all test suites)
npx hardhat coverage reports >= 95% branch coverage
slither reports zero HIGH severity findings
Gas benchmark assertions pass for all state-changing functions
Invariant properties verified for all four contracts
